notes.text: Integration Cards: Manifest-declared badges are now supported
Integration Card: multiple values are now supported
Integration Cards: Object Card horizontal group items width adjusted
sap.m.InstanceManager: closeAllDialogs promise is now resolved when dialog is destroyed during closing
sap.ui.integration.widgets.Card: Resolve snack card dialog resize on loading
sap.ui.integration.widgets.CardFacade: hideMessage method is now properly assigned
